summary: Backend-only testing of Cafe Journal API completed against EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (https://coffee-log-2.preview.emergentagent.com). All 27 pytest cases passed (100%). Coverage: health, auth (register/login/me incl. duplicate email 400, invalid creds 401, missing token 403, invalid token 401, short password 422), cafe CRUD (create with photos+location_link+rating+drink+date, GET, PUT partial update incl. rating+photos, DELETE then 404), multi-user isolation (User A cannot see/GET/PUT/DELETE User B's cafes -> 404), rating validation (rating=6 and rating=-1 -> 422 on create and update), and stats (empty user -> zeros/empty by_month; populated user -> correct total_cafes, average_rating, top_drink, five_star_count, by_month last-6-months aggregation). Frontend testing skipped per request.

minor.endpoint: GET /api/auth/me (and other protected routes) without token
minor.issue: Returns 403 (FastAPI HTTPBearer default) instead of 401. Functionally correct (rejected) and tests accept either, but consider auto_error=False + explicit 401 for API consistency with 'unauthorized' semantics.

action_items: (Optional) Standardize missing-token responses to 401 instead of 403 by using HTTPBearer(auto_error=False) and raising HTTPException(401) explicitly.
(Optional) Add an index on cafes.user_id (and {user_id, created_at}) in MongoDB for list/stats performance as data grows.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Pydantic v1-style data.dict() in update_cafe; works because the project pins compatible deps but consider data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True) for forward compatibility with Pydantic v2.
JWT_SECRET falls back to a dev default if env not set - acceptable for preview but ensure JWT_SECRET is set in production deployment.
Stats endpoint loads up to 10000 cafes into memory per request; fine for MVP but consider Mongo aggregation pipeline for scale.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in every read path. Good.
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_-prefixed users and cafes per run; no shared seed data. No cleanup teardown implemented - test data accumulates in MongoDB with TEST_ prefix for easy identification/removal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (currently https://coffee-log-2.preview.emergentagent.com). The review_request mentioned EXPO_BACKEND_URL but the actual var name is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - the test file checks both. All /api routes require Bearer token except /api/, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login. Cafe documents include user_id and a uuid 'id' field; _id is projected out. Rating must be 0..5 (Pydantic Field ge=0 le=5).
